issues.title: Narration timing must come from LLM, not calculated from TTS
Manim only renders FIRST visual beat - multi-beat rendering not implemented
Recap narration only 5 seconds - LLM not generating full recap narration
Manim videos not rendered - all topic videos return 404
issues.description: Sections 3-8 have renderer=manim and manim_code generated (2779+ chars) but video_path=None. Render execution fails or videos not copied to job folder.
issues.evidence: topic_3.mp4 through topic_9.mp4 missing. Only topic_10.mp4 exists (recap).
issues.root_cause: 1) LaTeX standalone.cls missing (FIXED via texliveFull), 2) LLM code has runtime errors (IMPROVED with validation)
issues.fix_applied: 1) Installed texliveFull nix package, 2) Added code validation for runtime patterns and completeness to manim_code_generator.py

issues.title: Avatar width_percent violates Display Summary Table
issues.description: Content sections showing width_percent=30 instead of 35%. Recap section has avatar='hidden' which violates 'Avatar ALWAYS VISIBLE' principle.
issues.requirement_violated: REQ-030, REQ-031, Display Summary Table (now updated to 52%)
issues.evidence: Job 5c5f4f3a shows width_percent=52 for all sections
issues.root_cause: MergeStep not enforcing display_requirements avatar widths
issues.fix_applied: Updated merge_step_v15.py to enforce 52% width and always-visible avatar

issues.title: LaTeX/Math formulas stripped from content
issues.description: Math PDF content with formulas shows NO LATEX in visual_content. $...$ blocks removed during processing.
issues.evidence: All 10 sections report NO LATEX in visual_content despite math PDF source
issues.root_cause: LLM prompts did not emphasize preserving LaTeX verbatim
fix_applied: 1) VisualSpecArtist system prompt: Added LATEX FORMULA PRESERVATION rule with explicit copy instructions
2) VisualSpecArtist user prompt: Added CRITICAL - FORMULA PRESERVATION step with examples
3) VisualSpecArtist schema: Added 'formulas' array field for multiple formulas
4) NarrationWriter prompt: Added FORMULA NARRATION rule for spoken formula descriptions
5) Both prompts now emphasize: Nothing omitted, nothing modified

issues.title: Narration/display desync - text remains after narration ends
issues.description: Narration completes but text content remains displayed. display_directives timing not synchronized with TTS duration.
issues.requirement_violated: Narration Sync Architecture (§7), TTS timing authoritative
issues.evidence: User report: 'narration completes' but 'lot of text displayed'
issues.root_cause: Player had no end-state handling - when t >= lastSeg.end_time, no display_directives were applied
issues.fix_applied: player.js: Added end-state handling in handleTimeUpdate() - when audio ends past last segment, applies textLayer='hide', avatarLayer='show' to fade out text while keeping avatar visible

issues.title: Recap video exists but player attempts to load missing videos
issues.description: Player tries to load topic_1_beat_0.mp4, topic_2_beat_0.mp4 etc which don't exist. Only topic_10.mp4 exists.
issues.requirement_violated: Player should gracefully handle missing videos
issues.evidence: Console shows 404 for all beat videos and section videos except topic_10
issues.root_cause: Player.js attempting to preload videos for sections without videos
issues.fix_applied: Added renderer-based detection to skip video checks for text-only sections (intro/summary/memory/quiz with renderer=none)

issues.title: Audio files generated as .wav instead of .mp3
issues.description: Audio directory contains .wav files (1_2.wav, 2_1.wav) but pipeline should generate .mp3
issues.evidence: ls audio/ shows .wav files
issues.root_cause: Edge TTS generating .wav, consolidation step not converting to .mp3

issues.title: Recap section avatar visibility='hidden' violates core principle
issues.description: Section 10 (recap) has avatar_layout.visibility='hidden' and width_percent=0. This violates 'Avatar ALWAYS VISIBLE' principle.
issues.requirement_violated: Core Principle #2: Avatar is ALWAYS VISIBLE
issues.evidence: Job 5c5f4f3a shows visibility='always' for all sections including recap
issues.root_cause: MergeStep was not enforcing avatar visibility for recap sections
issues.fix_applied: Updated merge_step_v15.py to ensure avatar_layer='show' and visibility='always' for all section types

issues.title: No audio files generated - TTS step failure
issues.description: Audio directory is empty. All segment audio_url fields are null. TTS step appears to have been skipped or failed silently.
issues.evidence: Job 3ffaf8d2: audio/ directory empty, all segments have audio_url=null
issues.root_cause: 1) _generate_pyttsx3 silently returned estimates on failure instead of raising exception, 2) audio_file was set unconditionally before verifying file exists, 3) edge_tts asyncio wrapper had event loop conflicts in Flask context
issues.fix_applied: 1) Added audio_path.exists() check before setting audio_file field, 2) Made _generate_pyttsx3 raise Pyttsx3Error on failure, 3) Improved edge_tts sync wrapper to handle existing event loops via ThreadPoolExecutor

issues.title: LaTeX standalone.cls still not found despite texliveFull installation
issues.description: Manim render fails with 'LaTeX Error: File standalone.cls not found' for sections using MathTex
issues.evidence: Sections 5, 6 fail with standalone.cls error in logs despite texliveFull being installed
issues.root_cause: Multiple conflicting texlive packages (texliveSmall, texliveMedium, texliveFull) causing path conflicts
issues.fix_applied: Removed texliveSmall and texliveMedium from .replit nix packages, keeping only texliveFull

issues.title: LLM-generated Manim code is truncated
issues.description: Generated Python code ends mid-statement with incomplete expressions like 'run_time=' without value
issues.evidence: Section 5 ends: 'run_time=', Section 7 ends: 'r"\csc A = \frac{5'
issues.root_cause: max_tokens=8000 was insufficient; finish_reason='length' not being detected
issues.fix_applied: 1) Increased max_tokens from 8000 to 16000, 2) Added finish_reason='length' detection with auto-retry and simplification request, 3) Updated system prompt with 100-150 line target

issues.title: render_spec.renderer field is MISSING
issues.description: All sections have renderer=MISSING in render_spec even when manim_scene_spec is populated
issues.evidence: Sections 3-7 have manim_code but renderer field is missing
issues.root_cause: MergeStep only used blueprint.suggested_renderer, not render_spec.renderer as fallback
issues.fix_applied: Updated _build_section_from_artifact to use render_spec.renderer as fallback when blueprint.suggested_renderer is missing

issues.title: Avatar width inconsistency between spec and code
issues.description: display_requirements.md specifies 52% avatar width for ALL section types, but player.js defaults to 60/45/35% per type
issues.evidence: player.js getDefaultAvatarWidth returns 60/45/35, but Display Summary Table shows 52% for all
issues.root_cause: Specification was updated to 52% uniform width but code still has legacy values
issues.fix_applied: 1) Updated player.js getDefaultAvatarWidth() to return 52 for ALL section types, 2) Updated Layer Architecture docs to say 52% for all

issues.title: V1.4 prompts still allow 'hidden' avatar option
issues.description: V1.4 prompts (content_director, recap_director) still contain avatar_position='hidden' and avatar_layer='hide' options
issues.evidence: grep found 50+ instances of avatar hide/hidden in core/prompts/*.txt
issues.root_cause: V1.4 prompts not updated when avatar-always-visible requirement was added
issues.note: WONTFIX: V1.4 prompts are legacy and will be deprecated. Player handles gracefully (defaults to show). V1.5 prompts are correct.

issues.title: display_requirements.md has inconsistent avatar widths in ASCII diagrams
issues.description: Display Summary Table says 52% for all, but ASCII diagrams show 60%/45%/35% for intro/summary/others
issues.evidence: Summary Table row shows 52% for all; ASCII diagrams show different values
issues.root_cause: Document was partially updated - table updated but ASCII diagrams not synced
issues.fix_applied: Updated all ASCII diagrams and avatar_layout lines to use width_percent: 52 for all section types

issues.title: Manim render execution still fails due to LLM code quality
issues.description: Even with ISS-138/139 fixes, LLM-generated Manim code often has runtime errors
issues.evidence: Job 3ffaf8d2: 0/5 Manim videos rendered despite code being present
issues.root_cause: LLM generates syntactically valid but runtime-invalid code (undefined variables, wrong method calls)
fix_applied: 1) Enhanced manim_builtins set with 100+ Manim classes/functions to reduce false positives
2) Added more animation types, shapes, colors, and Python builtins
3) Added rate functions and utilities like TracedPath, ParametricFunction
4) More comprehensive validation reduces retry loops for valid code

issues.title: SectionPlanner prompt has wrong avatar widths (60/45/35 instead of 52)
issues.description: SectionPlanner prompt shows avatar_width_percent as 60% for intro, 45% for summary, 35% for content/example/quiz/memory/recap. Should be 52% for ALL section types.
issues.evidence: grep 'avatar_width_percent' core/prompts/section_planner_system_v1.5.txt shows 60, 45, 35 values
issues.fix_applied: Updated all avatar_width_percent values to 52 in section_planner_system_v1.5.txt

issues.title: MemoryFlashcard prompt has wrong avatar width (35 instead of 52)
issues.description: MemoryFlashcard prompt shows width_percent: 35 in avatar_layout example. Should be 52% for all section types.
issues.evidence: Line 14 of memory_flashcard_system_v1.5.txt shows width_percent: 35
issues.fix_applied: Updated width_percent from 35 to 52

issues.title: RecapScene prompt has wrong avatar width (35 instead of 52)
issues.description: RecapScene prompt shows width_percent: 35 in avatar_layout example. Should be 52% for all section types.
issues.evidence: Line 12 of recap_scene_system_v1.5.txt shows width_percent: 35
issues.fix_applied: Updated width_percent from 35 to 52

issues.title: SmartChunker still v1.4 with deprecated 'remotion' renderer option
issues.description: SmartChunker prompt is still named v1.4 and includes 'remotion' as a renderer option. Should be renamed to v1.5 with only 'manim|video|none' options.
issues.requirement_violated: ISS-118: Remotion renderer removed from V1.5
issues.evidence: File named smart_chunker_system_v1.4.txt, line 21 shows 'remotion|manim|video'
issues.fix_applied: 1) Created smart_chunker_system_v1.5.txt and smart_chunker_user_v1.5.txt with 'manim|video|none' options, 2) Updated core/smart_chunker.py to use v1.5 prompts

issues.title: No intermediate artifact persistence for debugging
issues.description: All agent outputs are stored in-memory only. No artifacts saved to disk for debugging failed pipelines. Should save each agent output to {job_dir}/artifacts/ folder.
issues.evidence: grep 'artifacts' core/pipeline_v15.py shows only in-memory section_artifacts list
issues.fix_location: core/pipeline_v15.py - add artifact save after each agent call
issues.fix_applied: 1) Added _save_artifact() helper function, 2) Save chunker, planner, narration, visuals, render_spec, memory, recap outputs to artifacts/, 3) Save manim_failed_sections.json for retry capability
issues.verification: After fix, test job should create {job_dir}/artifacts/*.json files

issues.title: RecapScene word count mismatch (prompt says 150-180, code validates 100+)
issues.description: RecapScene prompt says 150-180 words per prompt, but code validates 100+ minimum. Should align at 100-180 to match API character limits.
issues.requirement_violated: ISS-120: WAN/Video prompts exceed API character limit
issues.evidence: Prompt lines 27, 45 say 150-180; recap_agent.py validates 100+ minimum
issues.fix_applied: Updated prompt to say 100-180 words instead of 150-180

issues.title: ManimCodeGenerator lacks proper output validation and retry logic
issues.description: ManimCodeGenerator needs: 1) Full AST syntax validation for Python code, 2) Retry logic with max attempts, 3) Graceful failure (no crash), 4) Failed section queue for later retry. Currently crashes on LLM failures.
issues.evidence: ISS-144 shows 0/5 Manim videos despite code presence; crashes halt pipeline
issues.fix_applied: 1) Added AST-based validation with _check_undefined_names(), 2) Enhanced error handling in pipeline to catch all exceptions, 3) Added manim_failed_sections tracking in pipeline, 4) Save failed sections to artifacts/manim_failed_sections.json for retry
issues.verification: 1) Run test with malformed manim section - should not crash, 2) Check {job_dir}/artifacts/manim_failed_sections.json created

issues.title: Avatar + Narration MUST be mandatory for ALL sections
issues.description: Documentation incorrectly shows avatar_visibility as optional. Avatar with gesture MUST ALWAYS be shown for ALL sections. Narration with audio is mandatory for ALL slides/sections. This is a core pedagogical principle.
issues.requirement_violated: Core principle: Avatar always visible, narration always present
issues.evidence: llm_requirement.md shows avatar_visibility: 'required|optional' and memory/recap without NarrationWriter
issues.fix_applied: 1) Changed avatar_visibility from 'required|optional' to 'always', 2) Added NarrationWriter to memory/recap in Section Type → Agent Usage table, 3) Added CRITICAL PRINCIPLE stating Avatar + Narration mandatory for ALL sections

issues.title: Memory section missing NarrationWriter - no audio sync
issues.description: Memory section only uses MemoryFlashcard agent, no NarrationWriter. Without narration, avatar has nothing to speak. All sections must have narration for audio sync.
issues.requirement_violated: ISS-152: Avatar + Narration mandatory for all sections
issues.evidence: Section Type → Agent Usage table shows memory: 'MemoryFlashcard' only, no NarrationWriter
fix_applied: 1) pipeline_v15.py: Added NarrationWriter call before MemoryFlashcard
2) pipeline_v15.py: Created memory_blueprint with section_type='memory'
3) merge_step_v15.py: _build_memory_section now uses narration from NarrationWriter if available

issues.title: Recap section missing NarrationWriter - video prompts have no narration
issues.description: Recap section only uses RecapScene agent, no NarrationWriter. Videos play but avatar has no narration to speak. All sections must have narration.
issues.requirement_violated: ISS-152: Avatar + Narration mandatory for all sections
issues.evidence: Section Type → Agent Usage table shows recap: 'RecapScene' only, no NarrationWriter
fix_applied: 1) pipeline_v15.py: Added NarrationWriter call before RecapSceneAgent
2) pipeline_v15.py: Created recap_blueprint with section_type='recap'
3) merge_step_v15.py: _build_recap_section now uses narration from NarrationWriter if available

issues.title: Quiz section should use flashcard-style display (conditional)
issues.description: Quiz sections from source document should display in flashcard style (array of Q/A pairs) synced with avatar narration. Quiz is conditional - only generated if quiz content exists in source PDF.
issues.evidence: User clarification: 'MemoryFlashcard for Quiz? Yes in Flashcard style... one section will display quiz and in sync with Narration - avatar'
issues.fix_applied: Documentation updated: Quiz section uses SmartChunker Q&A extraction → NarrationWriter formatting. NO separate QuizFlashcard agent needed.
issues.superseded_by: ISS-157 - SmartChunker Q&A extraction approach chosen as best solution

issues.title: Directory structure documentation uses {job_dir} instead of jobs/{job_id}
issues.description: Documentation uses placeholder '{job_dir}' but actual path is 'jobs/{job_id}'. Should be explicit for clarity.
issues.evidence: Storage Architecture section shows '{job_dir}/artifacts/' etc.
issues.fix_applied: Updated Directory Structure section to use 'jobs/{job_id}/' instead of '{job_dir}/'

issues.title: Quiz section handling - SmartChunker Q&A extraction approach
issues.description: Quiz sections need to extract Q&A pairs from PDF source (not LLM-generated) and display in flashcard style with avatar narration. SmartChunker extracts quiz_questions[] from PDF, SectionPlanner creates quiz section if quiz exists, NarrationWriter formats Q&A with pauses after questions.
issues.evidence: User clarification: Quiz questions come from PDF source, variable count (not fixed 5 like Memory), displayed as flashcards with pause after each question
issues.decision: SmartChunker extracts Q&A → SectionPlanner creates quiz section (conditional) → NarrationWriter formats with [pause 3s] → display_directives shows flashcard per Q&A
issues.why_best_approach: 1) No new agent needed, 2) Source integrity preserved, 3) Variable count natural, 4) NarrationWriter already handles formatting
fix_applied: 1) SmartChunker: Added quiz_questions[] to output schema and prompt
2) SectionPlanner: Added quiz section type handling (conditional on quiz_questions.length > 0)
3) NarrationWriter: Added quiz word limits and Q&A formatting with [pause 3s] example
4) pipeline_v15.py: quiz_questions passed to SectionPlanner and NarrationWriter
5) merge_step_v15.py: quiz added to TEXT_ONLY_SECTION_TYPES

issues.title: WAN/Video prompts exceed API character limit
issues.description: RecapScene prompts were 100-180 words which often exceeded 1000 characters, causing WAN API failures.
fix_applied: 1) recap_scene_system_v1.5.txt: Updated to 80-150 words, max 800 chars
2) recap_agent.py: Validation updated to 80+ words min, 800 char max
3) wan_prompt_validator.py: MAX_PROMPT_LENGTH=800, MIN_WAN_PROMPT_WORDS=80 (was 300)
4) wan_prompt_validator.py: hard_fail_on_short_prompts() now validates 80-150 words + 800 chars
5) wan_client.py: Added _truncate_prompt() safety method before API call

issues.title: WAN prompts not truncated before validation - validation fails instead of truncating
issues.description: Error 'Section 11: Beat 0: Prompt has 2901 chars, maximum 800 allowed' proves no truncation occurred before validation. ISS-120 added validation but validation fails instead of auto-truncating first.
issues.requirement_violated: WAN API character limit (800 chars max)
issues.evidence: User reported: Error rendering topic 11: Section-level WAN prompt validation failed: Section 11: Beat 0: Prompt has 2901 chars, maximum 800 allowed.
issues.root_cause: hard_fail_on_short_prompts() raises exception but wan_runner.py never calls truncation before validation
fix_applied: 1) wan_prompt_validator.py: Added truncate_wan_prompt() and truncate_video_prompts() functions
2) wan_runner.py: Import new truncation functions
3) wan_runner.py L121-122: Call truncate_wan_prompt() BEFORE validation for section-level prompts
4) wan_runner.py L178-180: Call truncate_video_prompts() BEFORE validation for video_prompts array
5) wan_runner.py L207-215: Updated from 300-word minimum to 80-word minimum per v1.5 spec
6) wan_runner.py L299-311: CRITICAL FIX - Added truncation for recap_scenes (was missing, caused 2901 char failure)

issues.title: Intro section showing text bullets instead of avatar-only display
issues.description: Intro section displays text bullets when it should only show centered avatar at 60-80%. Summary section has wrong avatar size and too many words displayed.
issues.evidence: User screenshot shows intro with 8+ bullet points and avatar on right instead of center. User: 'Intro should have been no Text but only Avatar 60 or even 80% centered'
issues.root_cause: merge_step_v15.py was setting text_layer='show' for intro and not enforcing avatar-only display
fix_applied: 1) merge_step_v15.py: Intro avatar_layout set to position='center', width_percent=60
2) merge_step_v15.py: Intro display_directives set to text_layer='hide', visual_layer='hide', avatar_layer='show'
3) merge_step_v15.py: Summary keeps text_layer='show' but avatar at 52% right
4) Updated section-type-specific display_directives logic

issues.title: TTS audio/video drift - single provider causes timing mismatch
issues.description: Audio length doesn't match visual duration because pipeline used ONLY Edge TTS (or only pyttsx3). Spec requires: pyttsx3 measures duration FIRST, then Edge TTS generates production audio. Different speaking rates cause display_directives to fire at wrong times.
issues.requirement_violated: V1.5 Narration Sync Architecture - TTS timing authoritative using pyttsx3 for measurement, Edge TTS for production voice
issues.evidence: User: 'Audio/video mismatch - Audio length doesn't match visual duration'
issues.root_cause: update_durations_from_tts() uses single provider for both measurement AND audio. Edge TTS ~130 WPM, pyttsx3 ~150 WPM = drift.
fix_applied: 1) tts_duration.py: Added update_durations_two_pass() function
2) Pass 1: pyttsx3 measures duration_seconds (local, fast, 150 WPM)
3) Pass 2: Edge TTS generates production audio (but KEEPS pyttsx3 durations)
4) pipeline_v15.py: Changed to use update_durations_two_pass() instead of single-pass
5) Metadata records: tts_method=two_pass, duration_provider=pyttsx3, audio_provider=edge_tts

issues.title: WAN prompts: LLM must generate within 800 char limit, not be truncated afterward
issues.description: User requirement: LLM should generate prompts within 800 char limit from the start. Truncating LLM responses post-generation is not approved - LLM must be instructed to generate appropriate length content.
issues.requirement_violated: User's 10 rules - LLM should generate within limits
issues.evidence: User: 'Make sure we update the WAN than chopping off this method is not approved'
issues.root_cause: video_prompt_system_v1.5.txt said 'MINIMUM 300 WORDS' which = ~1800 chars, far exceeding 800 char limit
fix_applied: 1) Updated video_prompt_system_v1.5.txt: Changed from 300+ words to 80-150 words / 800 chars max
2) Updated recap_scene_system_v1.5.txt: Added character_registry for consistency across 5 scenes
3) Updated recap_scene_user_v1.5.txt: Added character continuity requirements
4) pipeline_v15.py: Added per-prompt validation - each prompt individually checked for 800 char max
5) Truncation functions now LOG WARNING if triggered (indicates LLM didn't follow instructions)

issues.title: Character consistency across 5 recap video scenes
issues.description: Characters appearing in recap video scenes must be consistent - same names, same appearance descriptions across all 5 scenes.
issues.evidence: User: 'we have 5 video scenes and each scene character if displayed should be consistent same name etc'
issues.root_cause: No character registry in recap prompts - LLM invented new characters per scene
fix_applied: 1) Added character_registry to recap_scene_system_v1.5.txt output schema
2) Added Character Continuity section requiring same names/descriptions across all scenes
3) Added explicit instructions: DO NOT change character appearance between scenes

issues.title: Over-segmentation: 135 audio files for ~11 sections is excessive
issues.description: Job ac7de16d has 135 audio files for 11 sections (avg 12+ audio files per section). This indicates over-segmentation in NarrationWriter or VisualSpecArtist. Visual beats should be 3-5 per section max, not 10-20.
issues.evidence: Section 6: 20 audio files, Section 7: 17, Section 11: 17. Each beat = 1 audio file = 1 TTS call
issues.root_cause: LLM generating too many visual_beats per section (10-20 instead of 3-5)
issues.proposed_fix: Add MAX_BEATS_PER_SECTION=5 constraint to VisualSpecArtist prompt and merge_step validation

issues.title: Two-pass TTS is slow - use word count estimation + single Edge TTS pass
issues.description: Two-pass TTS with pyttsx3 for measurement is slow and complicated. User suggests: get word count from LLM narration, calculate duration using ~130 WPM formula, skip pyttsx3 entirely.
issues.evidence: User: 'can we not get words from LLM output for narration and calculate the time instead of using audio analysis'
issues.root_cause: Over-engineered TTS timing system
issues.proposed_fix: Use _estimate_duration() for timing, Edge TTS single-pass for production audio only

issues.title: Avatar sizing inconsistency - LLM sending small/medium causes player to resize
issues.description: Avatar resizing back to small/medium unexpectedly. LLM outputs may contain size hints that player tries to apply.
issues.evidence: User: 'reverify why Avatar is resizing back to small or something - may be LLM sending small/medium'
issues.root_cause: Player reads width_percent from LLM output instead of enforcing fixed matrix
issues.proposed_fix: FINAL AVATAR MATRIX: Intro=80% center, ALL others=55% right. Player ignores LLM width values.

issues.title: Text/LaTeX not visible - display issues persist
issues.description: Text and LaTeX formulas still not visible in content sections. Text layer visibility or styling issues.
issues.evidence: User: 'we were still not seeing text/latex earlier'
issues.root_cause: Possible CSS z-index issues or text_layer='hide' being applied incorrectly
issues.proposed_fix: Verify text layer CSS, ensure text_layer='show' is being applied correctly in content sections

issues.title: Videos rendering in small area / in avatar area
issues.description: Videos render in wrong location - too small or overlapping with avatar area on right side.
issues.evidence: User: 'videos were rendering in small area and also in video rendering in Avatar Area'
issues.root_cause: Video container sizing/positioning CSS issues
issues.proposed_fix: Video container must be 45% width on left, avatar 55% on right. Verify CSS layout.

issues.title: Pipeline parallelization - run rendering after all LLM work complete
issues.description: Opportunity to speed up pipeline: run TTS and video rendering concurrently after merge step completes.
issues.evidence: User: 'is there any opportunity to reduce time like run rendering later part after getting everything'
issues.root_cause: Sequential pipeline execution
issues.proposed_fix: After merge step: run TTS and WAN/Manim rendering in parallel using concurrent.futures

regressions_from_previous_fixes.note: ISS-137 fix resolves audio generation - edge_tts works with proper asyncio handling
Manim returns code 1 due to: 1) truncated code, 2) standalone.cls missing
